text.title: Persona Building Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Only one persona (need 3: primary+secondary+negative); 'everyone' violates persona specificity; no quotes; missing jtbd, pains_ranked, kill_criteria; secondary and negative absent.

list.pattern: Persona defined by demographics without a JTBD statement.
